html:
Nightmare Lights are light sources found within the Ruins. They cannot be opened or destroyed with a Hammer. Instead, the amount of light they emit depends on the current state of the Nightmare Cycle that the Ruins are in; the more extreme the magical state, the more the Nightmare Lights open up.

Nightmare Lights drain the player's Sanity when they are open and if the player is near. The actual magnitude of the drain depends on how much light is coming from the Nightmare Lights (how "open" they are). During the Warning phase they will drain 600 sanity/min, while in the Nightmare phase they will drain 900.

Shadow Creatures will appear around the lights, even if the player is not insane. The Shadow Creatures only appear during the Nightmare phase and are hostile to the player. Once the Nightmare Cycle is completely over, the creatures will die, dropping Nightmare Fuel in the process.

The lights are fueled by Nightmare Fuel extracted from unknown depths below. This is a major example of the excessive use of Nightmare Fuel by the Ancients that led to their downfall.

Nightmare Fissure

Nightmare Fissures are objects that appear in the Ruins and rarely in Caves, more specifically, on Stalagmite Terrain. They act identical to Nightmare Lights, but do not drain sanity. Depending on the phase of the Nightmare Cycle, they emit more or less light - the greater the light radius, the higher the chance of spawning Shadow Creatures. 

Each fissure can only spawn one creature, either a Terrorbeak or Crawling Horror. If the player has been detected by either one of these mobs, all other Terrorbeaks or Crawling Horrors in the vicinity will become solid and will be able to attack the player in a group. Once the fissure is closed, the first spawned Shadow Creature will automatically die, and the other ones will become neutral, assuming the player has enough Sanity.

Nightmare Fissures will reappear at the same location after a period of time. It is advisable to put a Sign or other item with a Map icon near these fissures to mark their locations, since these are the best places to find Nightmare Fuel.

Trivia

  • Nightmare Fissures were introduced in the Six Feet Under update.
  • Sometimes, Nightmare Lights and Fissures will open during the Calm State. During this time, they will emit blue light instead of red or pink light.

 Gallery

  • Nightmare Light - calm stage.
  • Nightmare Light - warning stage.
  • A Nightmare Light - nightmare stage.
  • Closed Nightmare Fissure.
  • Partially open Nightmare Fissure.
  • Open Nightmare Fissure.
  • Shadow Creatures surrounding a Nightmare Light as seen on the poster for The Stuff of Nightmares.
  • Open Nightmare Lights.


DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Don't Starve
Together
Nightmare Light
Object Info
0 (Calm)
-600/min (Warning/Dawn)
-900/min (Nightmare)
Renewable?
Cannot be destroyed.
Source
Sacred, Military, Labyrinth
Spawns
Miscellaneous
"nightmarelight"
“I wonder what function this served.”
–Wilson
“Light without fire is unnatural.”
–Willow
“Is light, but not good light.”
–Wolfgang
“It pulls power from beneath.”
–Wendy
“AN ANCIENT OPTICAL WAVELENGTH EMITTER”
–WX-78
“The ancients seem to have used nightmare fuel to power everything.”
–Wickerbottom
“They should have used wood.”
–Woodie
“The overuse of fuel was their downfall.”
–Maxwell
“Yet another ingenious use of that fascinating dark fuel.”
–Wagstaff
“It harnesses dark pöwers fröm beneath.”
–Wigfrid
“Not exactly my kind of nightlight.”
–Webber
“I don't care how weird it is, as long as it keeps darkness away.”
–Walani
“Am I crazy or is this light not helping my situation?”
–Warly
“Woodlegs don't trust this light.”
–Woodlegs
“LIGHT THROUGH YONDER BAD STUFFS”
–Wilba
“Night light for scary times”
–Wormwood
“Light is good. Light is very good.”
–Wheeler
“I regret poking my nose so far down here.”
–Winona
“Beware, beware, it says to me.”
–Wortox
“Don't like it, florp.”
–Wurt
“But can you roast marshmallows over it?”
–Walter
“I'd better not get too close.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đèn Ác Mộng là nguồn sáng được tìm thấy trong Tàn Tích. Chúng không thể được mở hoặc phá hủy bằng Búa. Thay vào đó, lượng ánh sáng chúng phát ra phụ thuộc vào trạng thái hiện tại của Chu kỳ Ác mộng mà Tàn tích đang ở trong đó; trạng thái phép thuật càng cực đoan thì Đèn Ác Mộng càng mở ra nhiều.
